title: astragalus laxiflorus
intro: Astragalus laxiflorus, also known as Chinese milkvetch or milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus laxiflorus include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus laxiflorus is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are available in various health food stores and online platforms.
